items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a full audit trail of delegation.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of a full audit trail for who delegated what and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the audit trail of delegation actions. The linked use case outlines the need for this audit trail, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that it has been implemented or validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
